title:

planMd:
# Plan: Plan Proactive AI Tutor Feature for IELTS Journey

## Summary

Create a detailed implementation plan for the Proactive AI Tutor feature including data integration, message generation, UI integration, and user settings.

## Tasks

1. Analyze existing AI Tutor and learning data modules
2. Design Proactive Message Generation Engine (depends on: Analyze existing AI Tutor and learning data modules)
3. Design User Settings and Configuration UI for Proactive AI Tutor (depends on: Design Proactive Message Generation Engine)
4. Design UI Integration Points for Proactive AI Tutor Messages (depends on: Design Proactive Message Generation Engine)
5. Create Proactive Message Data Model and Storage Schema (depends on: Design User Settings and Configuration UI for Proactive AI Tutor)
6. Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module (depends on: Create Proactive Message Data Model and Storage Schema, Design Proactive Message Generation Engine)
7. Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module)
8. Implement Proactive AI Tutor Settings UI Components (depends on: Design User Settings and Configuration UI for Proactive AI Tutor, Create Proactive Message Data Model and Storage Schema)
9. Implement Proactive Message Display Components in Dashboard and Chat UI (depends on: Design UI Integration Points for Proactive AI Tutor Messages, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
10. Implement Proactive Message Triggers on User Actions and Events (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
11. Integrate Proactive AI Tutor in Browser Extension UI (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Display Components in Dashboard and Chat UI, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
12. Implement Proactive AI Tutor Message Frequency and Quiet Hours Enforcement (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
13. Implement Automated Weekly and Monthly Progress Review Messages (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
14. Implement User Feedback and Interaction Handling for Proactive Messages (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Display Components in Dashboard and Chat UI, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System)
15. Create Comprehensive Integration Tests for Proactive AI Tutor Feature (depends on: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module, Implement Proactive Message Display Components in Dashboard and Chat UI, Implement Proactive Message Event Bus and Notification System, Implement Proactive AI Tutor Settings UI Components)
16. Document Proactive AI Tutor Feature Architecture and Usage (depends on: Create Comprehensive Integration Tests for Proactive AI Tutor Feature)
finalReportMd:
# Final Report

## Prompt

Add a feature called **Proactive AI Tutor** to IELTS Journey.

The goal is to make AI Tutor feel like a real personal IELTS tutor, not a passive chatbot that only answers when the user asks.

AI Tutor
